# doit_cloud_diagrams_statussheet (Data Source)

Retrieves the components of a specific Cloud Diagram layer. At least one component ID list must be provided.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Use case: Find a specific VPC and fetch its full component details.

# Step 1: Search for the component by name.
data "doit_cloud_diagrams_search" "vpc" {
  query = "my-production-vpc"
}

locals {
  target   = data.doit_cloud_diagrams_search.vpc.component[0]
  layer_id = local.target.ss_id
}

# Step 2: Fetch the component with all its properties.
# Use node_ids, element_ids, group_ids, etc. to request specific components.
data "doit_cloud_diagrams_statussheet" "vpc_details" {
  id       = local.layer_id
  node_ids = [local.target._id]
}

output "vpc_details" {
  value = data.doit_cloud_diagrams_statussheet.vpc_details.node[local.target._id]
}

# Use case: Fetch multiple component types at once.
# You can combine different ID lists in a single call.
data "doit_cloud_diagrams_statussheet" "mixed" {
  id          = local.layer_id
  node_ids    = [local.target._id]
  group_ids   = [local.target._id]
  link_ids    = [local.target._id]
}

output "mixed_results" {
  value = {
    nodes  = length(keys(data.doit_cloud_diagrams_statussheet.mixed.node))
    groups = length(keys(data.doit_cloud_diagrams_statussheet.mixed.group))
    links  = length(keys(data.doit_cloud_diagrams_statussheet.mixed.link))
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Layer ID to retrieve components for.

### Optional

- `attachment_ids` (List of String) Attachment component IDs to fetch.
- `combiner_ids` (List of String) Combiner component IDs to fetch.
- `element_ids` (List of String) Element component IDs to fetch.
- `group_ids` (List of String) Group component IDs to fetch.
- `link_ids` (List of String) Link component IDs to fetch.
- `node_ids` (List of String) Node component IDs to fetch.
- `note_ids` (List of String) Note component IDs to fetch.
- `p` (String) Space-separated projection fields for component documents.
- `timeouts` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `attachment` (Attributes Map) Map of attachment ID to attachment component. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--attachment))
- `combiner` (Attributes Map) Map of combiner ID to combiner component. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--combiner))
- `element` (Attributes Map) Map of element ID to element component. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--element))
- `group` (Attributes Map) Map of group ID to group component. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--group))
- `link` (Attributes Map) Map of link ID to link component. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--link))
- `node` (Attributes Map) Map of node ID to node component. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--node))
- `note` (Attributes Map) Map of note ID to note component. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--note))

<a id="nestedatt--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `read` (String) A string that can be [parsed as a duration](https://pkg.go.dev/time#ParseDuration) consisting of numbers and unit suffixes, such as "30s" or "2h45m". Valid time units are "s" (seconds), "m" (minutes), "h" (hours).


<a id="nestedatt--attachment"></a>
### Nested Schema for `attachment`

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) Attachment ID.
- `cld_account` (String) Cloud account ID.
- `cld_id` (String) Cloud resource ID (set on cloud-imported components).
- `cld_sync` (Boolean) Whether this component is synced with cloud.
- `cld_type` (String) Cloud account type.
- `color` (String) Attachment color.
- `group` (String) Parent group ID.
- `icon` (String) Attachment icon identifier.
- `issues` (Attributes List) Issues associated with this attachment. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--attachment--issues))
- `name` (String) Component name.
- `props` (String) Custom component properties (key-value pairs). Value is JSON-encoded.
- `tags` (List of String) Tags assigned to the component.

<a id="nestedatt--attachment--issues"></a>
### Nested Schema for `attachment.issues`

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) Issue reference ID.
- `comment` (String) Optional comment on the issue.
- `jira` (String) Linked Jira ticket key or URL.
- `snoozed` (Number) Snooze duration in seconds.



<a id="nestedatt--combiner"></a>
### Nested Schema for `combiner`

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) Combiner ID.
- `color` (String) Combiner color.
- `icon` (String) Combiner icon identifier.
- `items` (Attributes List) Components contained in the combiner. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--combiner--items))
- `name` (String) Combiner name.

<a id="nestedatt--combiner--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `combiner.items`

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) Component ID.
- `type` (String) Component type.

Read-Only:

- `cld_account` (String) Cloud account ID.
- `cld_id` (String) Cloud resource ID (set on cloud-imported components).
- `cld_sync` (Boolean) Whether this component is synced with cloud.
- `cld_type` (String) Cloud account type.
- `color` (String) Element color.
- `icon` (String) Element icon identifier.
- `issues` (Attributes List) Issues associated with this element. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--element--issues))
- `name` (String) Component name.
- `parent` (String) Parent element ID.
- `props` (String) Custom component properties (key-value pairs). Value is JSON-encoded.
- `tags` (List of String) Tags assigned to the component.

- `snoozed` (Number) Snooze duration in seconds.

### Nested Schema for `group`

Read-Only:

- `cld_sync` (Boolean) Whether this component is synced with cloud.
- `cld_type` (String) Cloud account type.
- `color` (String) Group color.
- `group_type` (String) Group type.
- `icon` (String) Group icon identifier.
- `issues` (Attributes List) Issues associated with this group. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--group--issues))
- `items` (Attributes List) Components contained in the group. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--group--items))

- `props` (String) Custom component properties (key-value pairs). Value is JSON-encoded.
- `tags` (List of String) Tags assigned to the component.

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) Issue reference ID.

- `snoozed` (Number) Snooze duration in seconds.

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) Component ID.

<a id="nestedatt--link"></a>
### Nested Schema for `link`

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) Link ID.
- `cld_account` (String) Cloud account ID.
- `cld_id` (String) Cloud resource ID (set on cloud-imported components).
- `cld_sync` (Boolean) Whether this component is synced with cloud.
- `cld_type` (String) Cloud account type.
- `connection_type` (String) Link connection type.
- `destination` (Attributes) Reference to a diagram component, including its parent diagram and layer. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--link--destination))
- `issues` (Attributes List) Issues associated with this link. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--link--issues))
- `name` (String) Component name.
- `origin` (Attributes) Reference to a diagram component, including its parent diagram and layer. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--link--origin))
- `owner_ss_id` (String) Owner layer ID for cross-diagram links.
- `props` (String) Custom component properties (key-value pairs). Value is JSON-encoded.
- `tags` (List of String) Tags assigned to the component.

<a id="nestedatt--link--destination"></a>
### Nested Schema for `link.destination`

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) Component ID.
- `scheme_id` (String) Parent diagram ID.
- `ss_id` (String) Parent layer ID.
- `type` (String) Component type.


<a id="nestedatt--link--issues"></a>
### Nested Schema for `link.issues`

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) Issue reference ID.
- `comment` (String) Optional comment on the issue.
- `jira` (String) Linked Jira ticket key or URL.
- `snoozed` (Number) Snooze duration in seconds.


<a id="nestedatt--link--origin"></a>
### Nested Schema for `link.origin`

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) Component ID.
- `scheme_id` (String) Parent diagram ID.
- `ss_id` (String) Parent layer ID.
- `type` (String) Component type.



<a id="nestedatt--node"></a>
### Nested Schema for `node`

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) Node ID.
- `cld_account` (String) Cloud account ID.
- `cld_id` (String) Cloud resource ID (set on cloud-imported components).
- `cld_sync` (Boolean) Whether this component is synced with cloud.
- `cld_type` (String) Cloud account type.
- `color` (String) Node color.
- `icon` (String) Node icon identifier.
- `infra_node` (Attributes) Reference to a linked infrastructure node in another diagram. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--node--infra_node))
- `instance_count` (Number) Number of instances represented by this node.
- `issues` (Attributes List) Issues associated with this node. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--node--issues))
- `name` (String) Component name.
- `parent` (String) Parent node ID.
- `props` (String) Custom component properties (key-value pairs). Value is JSON-encoded.
- `running` (Boolean) Whether the node is currently running.
- `tags` (List of String) Tags assigned to the component.

<a id="nestedatt--node--infra_node"></a>
### Nested Schema for `node.infra_node`

Read-Only:

- `_id` (String) Infrastructure node ID.
- `scheme_id` (String) Parent diagram ID.
- `ss_id` (String) Parent layer ID.


<a id="nestedatt--node--issues"></a>

Read-Only:

- `comment` (String) Optional comment on the issue.
- `jira` (String) Linked Jira ticket key or URL.
- `snoozed` (Number) Snooze duration in seconds.



<a id="nestedatt--note"></a>
### Nested Schema for `note`

Read-Only:

- `color` (String) Note background color.
